required_preferences.fact: Stays in her own neighborhood on weekends for rest and convenience—rarely goes on exploratory outings due to increased academic workload

supersedes.fact: Explores new city neighborhoods every other Saturday—never repeats the same outing consecutively

required_preferences.fact: Reviews her calendar and schedules immediately after dinner—completes all planning before her 8pm screen curfew

supersedes.fact: Reviews tomorrow’s calendar and schedules before bed every night—never goes to sleep without planning

required_preferences.fact: Prefers co-planning weekend errands and occasional apartment tours with her parents to facilitate their transition, blending family time with practical support
Shops for groceries only on Sunday mornings—never orders delivery or shops late weekday evenings
Prefers quiet library spaces for studying—never works in coffee shops or communal study rooms
Prioritizes quiet evenings at home to support her sister’s recuperation—declines most non-essential evening outings or social offers

persona: A law student specializing in intellectual property law
